ValidationRule.description: Checks for valid product combination data.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(ProductType__c, "Group"), OR( ProjectManagementAllowancePackage__c=true, ExpenseAllowancePackage__c=true, Option__c = true, SupplierCostsGroup__c = true, License__c = true, Intro__c=true, Outro__c=true ) )
